name: webhook
description:
Webhook substrate. Owns the WebhookSubscription entity (customer-registered inbound URLs + destinations) + WebhookDelivery entity (per-attempt outbound audit trail) + attribute-driven event registration (#[AsWebhookEvent]) + pluggable destinations (#[AsWebhookDestination]) + backoff strategies + signing with rotation grace + universal inbound receiver + Bus::batch fan-out + auto-disable on 410 / N consecutive failures + per-subscription rate limiting + health probes. Consumes versioning module for payload transformer chains + subscription api_version pinning.

Reimplementing the stackra/laravel-webhook shape under our namespace (Path B). Adds sophistication beyond spatie/laravel-webhook-server: multi-destination (HTTPS + EventBridge + PubSub), rotation grace, Bus::batch, rate limiting, auto-disable, health probes, api-version integration, payload compression, mTLS destinations.

list.name: AsWebhookEvent
list.usage: #[AsWebhookEvent(name: 'invitation.sent', version: 'v1', description: 'Fired when an invitation is dispatched.')]
list.description: Marks a class (usually an event or DTO) as a publishable webhook event. Build-time compiler auto-discovers + registers with WebhookRegistry. Subscribers declare which events they receive via WebhookSubscription.events jsonb array.

list.name: AsWebhookDestination
list.description: Registers a destination driver with WebhookDestinationRegistry. Consumers pick a destination when creating a subscription.

destinationDrivers.description: Pluggable destinations. https ships in v1; eventbridge + pubsub + mtls are feature-flag guarded (webhook.destination.eventbridge, etc).

backoffStrategies.description: Retry backoff strategies. StaticArray ships in v1; RetryAfterAware honours Retry-After header from receivers.

supported.name: static
supported.description: Fixed schedule. Same delay regardless of receiver behaviour.

supported.name: retry-after-aware
supported.description: Reads the receiver's Retry-After header on 429/503 responses. Falls back to StaticArray when absent.

headers.name: X-Webhook-ID
headers.description: Delivery ULID. Used for idempotency on the receiver side.

headers.name: X-Webhook-Event-Version
headers.description: Resolved payload version (e.g. 'v1') per versioning module's webhook resolver.

headers.name: X-Webhook-Timestamp
headers.description: Unix timestamp when payload was signed. Receiver rejects if abs(now - timestamp) > replay_window_seconds (default 300).

headers.name: X-Webhook-Signature-Previous
headers.description: Only during rotation grace: signature computed with the previous secret. Receiver accepts either.

headers.name: X-Webhook-Attempt
headers.description: 1-indexed attempt number for this delivery. Enables receiver deduplication.

central.description: Public inbound receiver + subscription CRUD unsubscribe surface.

tenant.description: Tenant admin surface — subscription CRUD + delivery audit + test / retry / rotate.
